name: Berry's Golf & Groove
about: Berry's Golf & Groove is an indoor venue combining golf simulation and dance services in Overland Park, KS. They feature four custom-built simulator bays with over 17.5 feet of width, utilizing Uneekor technology for advanced ball and club tracking. The venue offers hourly golf simulator rentals and a full dance studio with a sprung Marley floor, alongside certified instruction and special event hosting in a 4,000 sq. ft. event space. Pricing is based on peak and non-peak hours with cost-effective membership options available, and they accommodate the public with booking typically available 24 hours in advance.
why_golfers_like_it: Four custom-built simulator bays over 17.5 feet wide for a spacious swing experience
Uneekor Eye XO system with dual photometric 3,000 fps high-speed cameras for detailed ball data
Access to over 1,400+ golf courses with GSPro software

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB status not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Four simulators with dual photometric 3,000 fps high-speed cameras and infrared sensors
